stonetop.summary: A human lost to the Fen, now a hoarding, grieving brute.

system.concept: A human lost to the Fen, now a hoarding, grieving brute.
system.description: They were human once, corrupted by the Fen and the foul forces flowing through it. Little remains of that humanity: a rough shape, half-forgotten words, a terrible anger at what it has lost. They prize finery and mundane goods, anything that reminds them of their former life — and even more, they long for human connection. But hunger, shame, and greed usually lead them to lash out at any who show them kindness.
